# CodingAnthem

> Fast, free developer tools for your browser and AI workflows.

CodingAnthem is a collection of free, browser-based developer utilities built for developers and AI-assisted workflows. All tools run entirely client-side — no data is sent to a server. No sign-up required.

## Formatters

- JSON Formatter — format, validate, and minify JSON with syntax highlighting: /tools/json-formatter
- Markdown Previewer — live preview of Markdown as rendered HTML: /tools/markdown-preview
- JSON Statistics — analyze node count, nesting depth, type distribution, and size: /tools/json-statistics
- JSON Diff — compare two JSON documents and highlight changes: /tools/json-diff

## Encoders

- Base64 Encoder / Decoder — encode and decode text to and from Base64: /tools/base64
- String Escape / Unescape — escape or unescape special characters in strings: /tools/string-escape

## Generators

- UUID Generator — generate version 4 UUIDs instantly: /tools/uuid-generator
- Lorem Ipsum Generator — generate placeholder text: /tools/lorem-ipsum

## Converters

- Unix Timestamp Converter — convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates: /tools/timestamp-converter
- Color Converter — translate colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL: /tools/color-converter
- Number Base Converter — convert between binary, octal, decimal, and hex: /tools/base-converter
- Cron Expression Parser — decode cron expressions into plain English: /tools/cron-parser
- CSV to JSON — convert CSV data to a JSON array: /tools/csv-to-json
- JSON to CSV — convert a JSON array to CSV: /tools/json-to-csv
- YAML to JSON — convert YAML configuration to JSON: /tools/yaml-to-json
- JSON to YAML — convert JSON to YAML: /tools/json-to-yaml

## Text Utils

- Regex Tester — test regular expressions with live inline match highlighting: /tools/regex-tester
- Case Converter — switch between camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, and more: /tools/case-converter
- Text Diff — compare two texts side by side and highlight differences: /tools/text-diff
- Word Counter — count words, characters, sentences, and reading time: /tools/word-counter

## Security

- Hash Generator — compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 checksums: /tools/hash-generator
- Password Generator — create strong, random passwords with custom rules: /tools/password-generator
- JWT Decoder — decode and inspect JWT tokens (header, payload, signature): /tools/jwt-decoder
- JWT Generator — create signed JWT tokens with HS256/384/512: /tools/jwt-generator

## Web

- URL Encoder / Decoder — encode and decode URLs and query parameters: /tools/url-encoder
- URL Parser — break a URL into protocol, host, path, query params, and hash: /tools/url-parser
- HTML Entities Encoder / Decoder — escape and unescape HTML entities: /tools/html-entities
- Slug Generator — convert any text into a URL-friendly slug: /tools/slug-generator

## About

- All tools are free and require no account or sign-up.
- All processing happens in the browser using JavaScript and Web APIs.
- No data is transmitted to any server.
- Built with Next.js and React.
- Source: https://github.com/RahulGo8u/codinganthem
